#[derive(Debug)]
struct UserSession {
    id: String,
    user_id: u64,
    token: String,
    api_key: String,
    password_hash: String,
}

#[derive(Debug)]
struct Credentials {
    username: String,
    password: String,
    secret: Vec<u8>,
}

fn create_session() -> UserSession {
    let session = UserSession {
        id: "abc".into(),
        user_id: 1,
        token: "secret-token".into(),
        api_key: "sk-1234567890".into(),
        password_hash: "$2b$12$hash".into(),
    };
    println!("{session:?}");
    session
}
